fastfoods.name: chicken burger
fastfoods.ingredients: 500g ground chicken (a mix of dark and white meat stays juicier), 1 large egg, 1/2 cup breadcrums(panko or seasoned), 1/2 small onion, finely grated or minced, 2 cloves garlic minced, 1tsp salt, 1/4 tsp black pepper, 1tsp mayonnaise(keeps the meat ultra-moist)

fastfoods.name: french fries
fastfoods.ingredients: 1kg of potatoes, frying oil( Excellent choices include peanut oil, canola oil, or vegetable oil), seasoning(Fine Kosher salt or standard table salt), white vinegar(optional for preventing falling of the fries apart), cornstarch

fastfoods.name: Cuban sandwich
fastfoods.ingredients: Cuban bread, mojo roast pork(slow roasted pork), ham, swiss cheese(thinly sliced), pickles(sliced dill pickles) and mastard

drinks.name: Mango juice
drinks.ingredients: 2-3 ripe mangoes, 2 cups of water, 1-2 tsp of sugar/honey, ice cubes and 1tsp lemon/lice juice

drinks.name: Dragon Friut juice
drinks.ingredients: 2-3 small dragon friut, 2 cups of water, 1-2 tsp of sugar/honey, ice cubes and 1tsp lemon/lice juice

bakedfoods.name: Banana Bread
bakedfoods.ingredients: 3/4 medium bananas, ½ cup (1 stick) of unsalted butter, melted or softened at room temperature, ¾ cup of packed light brown sugar/granulated white sugar, 2 large eggs, beaten, 1 teaspoon of pure vanilla extract, 2 cups of all-purpose flour, 1 teaspoon Baking soda and ½ teaspoon of fine salt to balance the sweetness.

bakedfoods.name: chocolate brownies
bakedfoods.ingredients: 1/2 cup to 1 cup (1 to 2 sticks) of melted butter, granulated white sugar (for the crackly top) and light brown sugar (for moisture and chewiness), 2 to 4 large eggs, Unsweetened natural cocoa powder or Dutch-process cocoa powder, All-Purpose Flour and A basic pinch of salt

bakedfoods.name: Butter cookies
bakedfoods.ingredients: 1 cup (227g) unsalted, softened to room temperature, 1/2 to 1 cup granulated sugar (or sifted powdered sugar for a softer texture), 1 large egg (or 2 egg yolks for a richer, crumblier texture), 2 teaspoons pure vanilla extract, 2 to 2 1/2 cups all-purpose flour and 1/2teaspoon salt(omit if using salted butter)

bakedfoods.name: croissants
bakedfoods.ingredients: 4 cups (500g) of bread flour or all-purpose flour, 1 to 1 1/2 cups (240-360ml) total, usually a mix of cold water and whole milk, ¼ cup (50g) granulated sugar, 1 tbsp (7-10g) active dry yeast or instant yeast, 2 tsp (12g) salt and 3 to 4 tbsp (40-56g) of softened, unsalted butter mixed directly into the dough.
